positive: Minimalist stylized mountain landscape silhouette at sunset. Clean vector art style with deep indigo, burnt orange, and dusty rose color gradients. The composition features three layered mountain ranges of varying height, forming a clean, geometric arc against a soft gradient sky. Include stylized, wispy abstract clouds and a single, bold crescent moon in the upper quadrant. Centered, symmetrical composition suitable for screen printing on fabric. High contrast, clean lines, graphic, perfect for apparel print.
negative: blur, noisy, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, messy, grunge, low quality, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poorly drawn, deformed
